en: I heard that your dreams came true.
Guess she gave you things I didn't give to you.
ko: 그녀가 내가 주지 못한 것들을 너에게 줬나 봐.

en: Old friend, why are you so shy?
Ain't like you to hold back or hide from the light.
ko: 너답지 않게 숨거나 빛을 피하는 것 같아.

en: I hate to turn up out of the blue uninvited.
But I couldn't stay away, I couldn't fight it.
ko: 하지만 나는 멀리할 수가 없었어, 이겨낼 수가 없었어.

en: I had hoped you'd see my face.
And that you'd be reminded that for me it isn't over.
ko: 그리고 네가 나에게는 아직 끝나지 않았다는 걸 기억해주길.
